risk_factors: Minor risk of removing imports that may be used by reflection or runtime frameworks - however Spring AI framework typically uses explicit dependency injection patterns
Potential for breaking custom annotation processing or compile-time code generation tools that rely on specific imports
Risk of merge conflicts with concurrent development work on the same files
positive_findings: Clean code maintenance approach removing unused imports across the codebase
Changes are limited in scope with minimal net change (+2/-14 lines)
Copyright year updates show proper license header maintenance
No changes to actual implementation logic, preserving existing functionality
Test files maintained their existing patterns and structure
risk_summary: This is a low-risk maintenance PR that removes unused imports without modifying functionality. The changes are minimal and focused on code cleanliness with proper copyright updates where needed.
